body_txt: There's that one character who has these as their defining feature. They've been called " Dumbo " more often than they'd like to admit. How much the size of their ears bothers them can vary — sometimes they're the Butt-Monkey , other times they've accepted it. Sometimes overlaps with Super-Hearing , Ear Wings , and Expressive Ears . See Boob-Based Gag , Gag Lips , Gag Nose , and Gag Penis for other examples of comically oversized anatomy.
